title: noccaea oxyceras
intro: Noccaea oxyceras, also known as Alpine Pennycress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Noccaea oxyceras include potential applications in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as supporting cardiovascular and immune system health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
